nodes.premise: Meal: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Variation - name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Variation | short_description: A plant-forward combination of vegetable soup, whole grain bread, and a side salad for fiber, nutrients, and steady energy. | meal_suggestion: Serve 1 cup of vegetable soup with 1 to 2 slices of whole grain bread and a side salad. For extra protein, add beans, lentils, or tofu to the soup or include a protein-rich topping on the salad. | nutrition_note: Plant-forward, fiber-rich meal with vegetables, whole grains, and greens. High in dietary fiber and vitamins; provides moderate protein from soup and bread. To keep sodium in check, choose a low-sodium vegetable soup. Optional protein boost (beans, lentils, or tofu) can be added for more protein.

nodes.premise: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Combo - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Combo | short_description: Bell peppers stuffed with lean turkey, rice, tomato sauce, and cheddar—a balanced mix of protein, starch, and vegetables. | meal_suggestion: Serve one stuffed pepper per person with a simple side salad. For a lighter version, use brown rice and reduced-fat cheddar; choose low-sodium tomato sauce. Bake until peppers are tender. | nutrition_note: High in protein from lean ground turkey; includes complex carbs from rice and fiber from peppers. Cheddar adds fat and calcium. Tomato sauce provides lycopene; to manage sodium, use low-sodium sauce and consider brown rice for extra fiber.

nodes.premise: Meal: DIY Taco Night — Garden Veg Wrap - name: DIY Taco Night — Garden Veg Wrap | short_description: DIY Taco Night Garden Veg Wrap: lean ground beef, corn tortillas, lettuce, tomato, cheddar, and salsa wrapped into a protein-rich, veggie-forward option. | meal_suggestion: To boost nutrition: use whole-grain tortillas, add a bean or avocado side, and load with extra veggies.
